name: paraguacraft-launcher
description: Paraguacraft Launcher - cliente de Minecraft Java multiplataforma (Tauri v2 + Vue 3)

scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && tauri build && node scripts/rename-windows-installer.mjs && node scripts/patch-latest-json.mjs
scripts.release:windows:ci: tauri build --verbose --config src-tauri/tauri.ci.windows.conf.json && node scripts/rename-windows-installer.mjs && node scripts/patch-latest-json.mjs
